visual.summary: A hand uses a pen to draw on a white dotted notebook page. Across the sampled frames, small triangular shapes are added and then combined with curved lines into two simple face-like drawings, one above the other, with circular outlines added later around each face.
sequence: A notebook and pen are held over a table; the page is blank or nearly blank at the start of the sample.
Small triangle-like shapes appear near the upper area of the page and another similar shape lower down.
Curved lines are added around the upper cluster, suggesting a partial outline or arc.
The lower cluster gains more linework, including another triangular form and a curved line below it.
Two face-like drawings become clearer: each has triangular eye/hat-like shapes and small interior details, with a smile-like curve under the lower one.
A large circle is drawn around the upper face-like cluster, and a smaller circular outline surrounds the lower one.
By the last frame, both clusters are enclosed in round outlines and the pen is still near the lower drawing.
visual.setting: A close-up view of a dotted notebook page on a wooden tabletop, with a person’s hands and pen entering from the edges of the frame.
subjects: A right hand holding a pen
Another hand briefly steadying or near the notebook
A blue pen earlier in the sequence
A gray pen nib and barrel in the later frames
Two small face-like drawn figures made of triangles, curves, and circles
toolsAndMaterials: Pen with gray barrel and metal nib
marksAndForms: Curved arc above the upper figure
Small interior marks within the triangular shapes
A smile-like curved line under the lower figure
Two stacked face-like clusters, one above the other
visibleText: Partial pink text on a page edge or cover reading "Whistleg..."
visual.camera: Static overhead close-up contact-sheet framing, with each panel showing a slightly different moment and angle of the notebook and hands.
uncertainties: The exact subject of the drawings is not established beyond their face-like appearance.
The video may include additional drawing steps between sampled frames.
The visible pink text is only partially legible.
The people’s identities and relationship are not established.
